{"fileKey":"EaE3QXT7UV66RFZRXppOvi","description":"釉뚮━??移대뱶 ???샕룻뀓?ㅽ듃 base64 eval","code":"(async()=>{\nconst b64=\"\";\nconst bin=atob(b64);\nconst u8=new Uint8Array(bin.length);\nfor(let i=0;i<bin.length;i++)u8[i]=bin.charCodeAt(i);\nconst t=new TextDecoder(\"utf-8\").decode(u8);\nreturn await (0,eval)(t);\n})();"}
